name: io.github.smijo-geek/scamcheck-mcp-server
description: Scan suspicious messages, URLs, and text for scams with AI. Verdict, risk score 0-100, category, and next steps. Free tier, no API key required.

environmentVariables.name: SCAMCHECK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for higher limits (free anonymous tier works without it)
